series_metadata.series_description: Virtual files and images of Surplus Lines Quarterly Reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review after 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until imaged; then destroy hard copy. Retain image and review after 5 years, transfer to updated media if needed at that time., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Permanent
